description:
Advances: mutagen.ast

Deliverable: migrate .spec/specs/ast.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema:
- spec-scenarios block: reshape each scenario to given:/when:/then: arrays (bespoke shape fails parse with 'expected array').
- spec-verification block: replace execute:/source_file: stubs with command: and target: entries; every requirement gets a verification entry.
- spec-meta: flip status: draft -> active once the file validates.
- keep prose, intent, id, surface, and decisions links intact.

Verification:
- mix spec.validate emits ZERO errors for mutagen.ast (baseline: 4 errors on this file).
- subject status is active in .spec/state.json.

Out of Scope (files): every .spec.md EXCEPT ast.spec.md; lib/**; test/**.
Allowed touches: .spec/specs/ast.spec.md only.
Out of Scope (intent): no realized_by bindings (phase2); no code/test edits; do not alter requirement ids or delete requirements.
Merge gate: mix spec.validate (0 errors for mutagen.ast) && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED

Migrated .spec/specs/ast.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema.

Changes (Allowed touches only: ast.spec.md + generated state.json):
- spec-scenarios: reshaped all 9 scenarios (s1-s9) to given:/when:/then: arrays. Quoted/block-literal scalars containing flow-collection syntax (e.g. `[line: 1]`, `[:Foo, :Bar]`) to satisfy the YAML parser.
- spec-verification: v1 and v3 converted from kind: source_file (path:/execute:) to kind: command with target: mix test <path>; v2 converted command: -> target:. All 5 requirements (r1-r5) retain a covering verification entry.
- spec-meta: status draft -> active.
- Prose, intent, ids, surface, decisions links unchanged. No requirement ids altered or deleted. No realized_by bindings added (phase2).
- Regenerated tracked .spec/state.json (committed with the edit).

Merge gate (local):
- mix spec.validate -> ZERO errors AND zero warnings for subject mutagen.ast (other unmigrated subjects still show errors; expected this phase).
- subject mutagen.ast status = active in .spec/state.json (meta.status).
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors -> clean.
- mix test -> 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded).

Commit b7d488e on branch mutagen-835.2.9/migrate-ast.

title: migrate mutagen.ast to SpecLedEx schema (4 errors)
